functions.label: Register Iris Wallet
functions.description: Register a new wallet linked to your iris scan and World ID. This creates your unique iris-authenticated wallet.

parameters.name: proof
parameters.label: ZK Proof
parameters.description: Zero-knowledge proof of your World ID

functions.label: Deactivate Wallet
functions.description: Deactivate your iris wallet. You can reactivate it later.

parameters.name: nullifierHash
parameters.label: Nullifier Hash
parameters.description: The nullifier of the wallet to deactivate

functions.label: Reactivate Wallet
functions.description: Reactivate a previously deactivated iris wallet.

parameters.name: nullifierHash
parameters.label: Nullifier Hash
parameters.description: The nullifier of the wallet to reactivate
